title: Roger Yang
compiled_truth: Roger Yang is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1998-09-01 to 2001-07-10), Roger Yang sent 53 and received 836 emails, totalling 889 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (48), [Susan Mara](people/susan-mara) (37), [Mona Petrochko](people/mona-petrochko) (32), [Dennis Benevides](people/dennis-benevides) (24), [Scott Stoness](people/scott-stoness) (24).
timeline:

- **2001-07-10** | Last recorded email in corpus
